name: Knowledge Base — Bedrock
description: Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Base with OpenSearch Serverless vector store and S3 document source. Supports configurable chunking strategies for document ingestion.

resources.name: Bedrock Knowledge Base
resources.description: Vector knowledge base with embedding model configuration

resources.name: Data Source (S3)
resources.description: S3 bucket as document source with chunking configuration

resources.name: OpenSearch Serverless Collection
resources.description: Vector search collection for document embeddings

resources.name: OpenSearch Security Policies
resources.description: Encryption and network policies for the collection

resources.name: S3 Document Bucket
resources.description: Versioned, encrypted bucket for source documents

resources.name: IAM Role
resources.description: KB execution role with S3, OpenSearch, and Bedrock permissions

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Project name used as prefix for all resources

parameters.name: chunking_strategy
parameters.description: Document chunking strategy (FIXED_SIZE, SEMANTIC, HIERARCHICAL, NONE)
